name: last6-q4boost
description: ds4's proven mixed experiment as a recipe: last six expert layers (37-42) at Q4_K, rest IQ2
_note: Static-layer variant of the boost (no imatrix analysis needed to resolve the layers; swap `imatrix` for your domain). Mirrors ds4's gguf-tools/mixed last-six-layers experiment (~91 GB vs ~153 GB full Q4) but requantizes in one pass instead of splicing.
